title: Database Connection Pool Saturation Runbook
content: Alert DatabaseConnectionPoolSaturation means orders-api is close to exhausting available database connections. First check active request rate, database latency, and recent deployments. If database latency is normal, reduce orders-api worker concurrency by one step and monitor pool utilization for 10 minutes. If database latency is high, escalate to orders-platform and database-oncall before changing application concurrency. Review the related PagerDuty incident notes for recent mitigation history.
